boosts.name: Advanced Training
boosts.description: Advanced Training <Reaction> <Any Phase>: Once per Round, when a Friendly Support Unit activates a Special Ability that costs CP, resolve that ability with its CP cost reduced by 1 (to a minimum of 0). Do not Exhaust this card.

boosts.name: Speed on Creep
boosts.description: Speed on Creep <Passive> <Any Phase>: If the active Friendly Zerg Unit is ON CREEP, increase its Speed characteristic by 1.

boosts.name: Living Glob of Tissue
boosts.description: Living Glob of Tissue <Passive> <Any Phase>: Creep Tumor tokens have STAY IN PLAY and DISPLACEMENT.

boosts.name: Creep Removal
boosts.description: Creep Removal <Passive> <Any Phase>: If an Enemy Unit ends a Move, Run, Charge or Disengage action within 1" of a Friendly Creep Tumor token, remove that token from the battlefield.

boosts.name: Vehicle Weapons
boosts.description: Vehicle Weapons <Active> <Assault Phase>: The active Mechanical Unit’s first used Ranged Weapons gain CRITICAL HIT (1).

boosts.name: Vehicle Plating
boosts.description: Vehicle Plating <Reaction> <Any Phase>: Use before a Friendly Mechanical Unit makes an Armour Roll. That Unit gains TOUGH (1) for this roll.

boosts.name: Go! Go! Go!
boosts.description: Go! Go! Go! <Active> <Movement Phase>: The active Biological Unit performs a 2" Move action. This does not count towards its action limit.
Go! Go! Go! <Active> <Movement Phase>: The active Biological Unit performs a 2" Move action. This does not count towards its action limit.
boosts.name: Go! Go! Go!

boosts.description: Armed and Ready <Active> <Movement Phase>: The active Biological Unit Deploys from any table edge that is not a player's Entry Edge. No model may be placed Within 10" of any Enemy model. This ability cannot be used if another Friendly Biological Unit has already been Deployed this Round.
boosts.name: Armed and Ready

boosts.description: Go! Go! Go! <Active> <Movement Phase>: The active Biological Unit performs a 2" Move action. This does not count towards its action limit.
boosts.name: Go! Go! Go!
Let's Have a Blast!
boosts.description: Let's Have a Blast! <Active> <Assault Phase>: The active Biological Unit’s first used Ranged Weapon gains ANTI-EVADE (1).

Mass Recall <Active> <Movement Phase>: Once per Game. Place a Faction Indicator anywhere on the battlefield. All Friendly Protoss Units Within 6" of this Faction Indicator are removed from the battlefield and placed in Reserves.
boosts.name: Mass Recall
Dae’Uhl
boosts.description: Dae’Uhl <Reaction> <Any Phase>: When a Friendly Unit receives Damage, reduce the Total Damage by 2 (to a minimum of 1).

boosts.name: Strap in!
boosts.description: Strap in! <Active> <Movement Phase>: The active, Unengaged Ground Unit is placed in Reserves instead of performing an action.

Ready For Dust-off <Active> <Movement Phase>: Place a Faction Indicator anywhere on the battlefield more than 10" away from any Enemy model. At the End of the Round, the controlling player may Deploy one Ground Unit from Reserves in base-to-base contact with this Faction Indicator.
boosts.name: Ready For Dust-off
Infantry Weapons
boosts.description: Infantry Weapons <Active> <Assault Phase>: The active Biological Unit’s first used Ranged Weapon gains CRITICAL HIT (1).
Infantry Armor <Reaction> <Any Phase>: Use before a Friendly Biological Unit makes an Armour Roll. That Unit gains TOUGH (1) for this roll.
boosts.name: Infantry Armor

boosts.description: Extended Claws <Active> <Assault Phase>: The active Unit gains a +1 Modifier to all IMPACT Hit Rolls.
boosts.name: Extended Claws

boosts.description: Carapace <Reaction> <Any Phase>: Use before a Friendly Unit makes an Armour Roll. That Unit gains TOUGH (1) for this roll.
boosts.name: Carapace
Field Repair
boosts.description: Field Repair <Active> <Movement Phase>: The active Mechanical Unit resolves the HEAL (2) effect.

boosts.name: Ground Weapons
boosts.description: Ground Weapons <Active> <Assault Phase>: The active Ground Unit’s first used Ranged Weapon gains CRITICAL HIT (1).

boosts.name: Ground Armor
boosts.description: Ground Armor <Reaction> <Any Phase>: Use before a Friendly Ground Unit makes an Armour Roll. That Unit gains TOUGH (1) for this roll.
Quick Strikes <Active> <Combat Phase>: The active Unit’s first used Close Combat Weapon gains PRECISION (2).

boosts.description: Zealous Charge <Active> <Movement Phase>: The active Unit gains BUFF Speed (2).
boosts.name: Zealous Charge

boosts.description: Quick Strikes <Active> <Combat Phase>: The active Unit’s first used Close Combat Weapon gains PRECISION (2).
boosts.name: Quick Strikes
Lie in Wait
boosts.description: Lie in Wait <Active> <Movement Phase>: The active, Unengaged Ground Unit gains the Burrowed Status.

Creep Spread <Active> <Movement Phase>: Place a Creep Tumor token on the battlefield Within 6" (Line of Sight is not required) of either a Friendly Entry Edge or an existing Friendly Creep Tumor token.
boosts.name: Creep Spread

boosts.description: Missile Attacks <Active> <Assault Phase>: The active Unit’s first used Ranged Weapon gains PRECISION (1).
boosts.name: Missile Attacks

boosts.description: Omega Network <Active> <Movement Phase>: Once per Game. Place a Friendly Omega Worm Unit anywhere on GROUND LEVEL of the battlefield more than 10" away from any Enemy model. This Round, the Omega Worm is not eligible to use its Special Abilities (excluding Structure).
boosts.name: Omega Network

boosts.description: Wild Mutation <Active> <Any Phase>: If the active unit is ON CREEP, the Unit gains BUFF Speed (1) and its first used Weapon gains PRECISION (1).
boosts.name: Wild Mutation
Zerg Creep
boosts.description: Zerg Creep <Passive> <Any Phase>: During Army Building, select exactly one Creep Card and add it to their Army List, paying its listed cost (if any).

boosts.name: Pylon Warp-In
boosts.description: Pylon Warp-In <Active> <Movement Phase>: Once per Game. Place a Friendly Pylon Unit anywhere on GROUND LEVEL of the battlefield more than 10" away from any Enemy model. This Round, the Pylon is not eligible to use its Special Abilities (excluding Structure).

boosts.name: Bound by the Khala
boosts.description: Bound by the Khala <Active> <Movement Phase>: At the end of the active Unit’s Activation, select one other Friendly Unit that is eligible to Activate in the current Phase. Immediately Activate that Unit.

boosts.name: Predation
boosts.description: Predation <Active> <Any Phase>: The active Unit’s Close Combat Weapons gain INSTANT.

boosts.name: Creep Spread
boosts.description: Creep Spread <Active> <Movement Phase>: Place a Creep Tumor token on the battlefield Within 6" (Line of Sight is not required) of either a Friendly Entry Edge or an existing Friendly Creep Tumor token.

boosts.description: Strategic Recall <Active> <Movement Phase>: The active, unengaged Ground Unit is placed in Reserves instead of performing an action.

boosts.name: Photon Overcharge
boosts.description: Photon Overcharge <Reaction> <Any Phase>: Use when an Enemy Unit enters the battlefield from Reserves via a location other than its own Entry Edge. That Unit immediately suffers HITS 3 (1).
Strategic Recall <Active> <Movement Phase>: The active, unengaged Ground unit is placed in Reserves instead of performing an action.

boosts.description: Surveillance <Active> <Movement Phase>: Place a Faction Indicator anywhere on the battlefield. While Enemy Units are Within 6" of this Faction Indicator they lose HIDDEN.

boosts.description: Gravitic Boosters <Reaction> <Assault Phase>: Use after a Friendly Unit rolls a D6 for Charge Distance. Add 1 to the Charge Distance for this Unit.
boosts.name: Gravitic Boosters
ComSat Station
boosts.description: ComSat Station <Active> <Movement Phase>: Select one table edge that is not a player’s Entry Edge. Until the End of the Round, Enemy Units cannot Deploy from that edge.

boosts.name: Scanner Sweep
boosts.description: Scanner Sweep <Active> <Movement Phase>: Place a Faction Indicator anywhere on the battlefield. While Enemy Units are Within 6" of this Faction Indicator they lose HIDDEN.

boosts.name: Excrete Creep
boosts.description: Excrete Creep <Active> <Assault Phase>: Place a Creep Tumor token on the battlefield Within 6" (Line of Sight is not required) of either a Friendly Entry Edge or an existing Friendly Creep Tumor token.

Ventral Sacs <Active> <Movement Phase>: Place a Faction Indicator anywhere on the battlefield more than 10" away from any Enemy model. At the End of the Round, the controlling player may Deploy one Ground Unit from Reserves in base-to-base contact with this Faction Indicator.
boosts.name: Ventral Sacs

boosts.description: Pneumatized Carapace <Reaction> <Assault Phase>: Use after a Friendly Unit rolls a D6 for Charge Distance. Roll an additional D6 and select the highest result to calculate the total Charge Distance.
boosts.name: Pneumatized Carapace

boosts.description: Oversight Mode <Active> <Movement Phase>: Place a Faction Indicator anywhere on the battlefield. While Enemy Units are Within 6" of this Faction Indicator they lose HIDDEN.
boosts.name: Oversight Mode

boosts.description: Guardian Shell <Reaction> <Any Phase>: Use before a Friendly Ground Unit makes an Armour Roll. That Unit gains DODGE (2) for this roll.
boosts.name: Guardian Shell
Rapid Reinforcements
boosts.description: Rapid Reinforcements <Active> <Movement Phase>: Place a Friendly Point Defence Drone Unit anywhere on the battlefield, more than 1" away from any Enemy model. Remove this Unit at the End of the Round.

Ready for Pickup? <Active> <Movement Phase>: Once Per Game. The active Unit resolves the PLACE (12) effect. Models placed by this effect cannot be set up within Engagement Range of any Enemy Unit. This resolves instead of performing a standard Action.
boosts.name: Ready for Pickup?

boosts.description: Nasty Surprise <Active> <Assault Phase>: The active Ground Unit loses the Burrowed Status.
boosts.name: Nasty Surprise

boosts.description: Feral Rage <Active> <Combat Phase>: The active Unit’s first used Close Combat Weapon gains PRECISION (2).
boosts.name: Feral Rage

boosts.description: Feral Rage <Active> <Combat Phase>: The active Unit’s first used Close Combat Weapon gains PRECISION (2).
boosts.name: Feral Rage

boosts.description: Timing Push <Active> <Movement Phase>: The active Zergling Unit Deploys from any table edge that is not a Player’s Entry Edge. This action must end more than 10" away from any Enemy model.
boosts.name: Timing Push

boosts.description: Additional Supply Depots <Active> <Movement Phase>: The active Unit’s Supply Value is improved by 1 for the purpose of Controlling and Contesting Mission Markers and completing objectives.
boosts.name: Additional Supply Depots
Tactical Retreat
boosts.description: Tactical Retreat <Active> <Movement Phase>: The active Unit ignores the Disengage penalty for the remainder of the Round.

boosts.name: Terran Tenacity
boosts.description: Terran Tenacity <Active> <Movement Phase>: Once per Game. Immediately claim the First Player Marker. No other player may claim the First Player Marker for the remainder of this Phase.

boosts.name: Weapons of the Firstborn
boosts.description: Weapons of the Firstborn <Active> <Assault Phase>: The active Ground Unit’s first used Ranged Weapon gains BUFF Range (4).
Veil of Shadows <Reaction> <Any Phase>: Use after a Friendly Unit resolves a PLACE effect. That Unit immediately resolves the HEAL (2) effect.
boosts.name: Veil of Shadows
Quick Strikes
boosts.description: Quick Strikes <Active> <Combat Phase>: The active Unit’s first used Close Combat Weapon gains PRECISION (2).

Warp In <Active> <Movement Phase>: The active Ground Unit Deploys from any table edge that is not a player’s Entry Edge. This deployment must end more than 10" away from any Enemy model. The controlling player cannot use this ability if another Friendly Ground Unit has already Deployed this Round.
boosts.name: Warp In
Phase
boosts.description: Phase <Active> <Movement Phase>: The active Unit resolves the PLACE (3) effect.

Warp Conduit <Active> <Movement Phase>: Place a Faction Indicator anywhere on the battlefield more than 10" away from any Enemy model. At the End of the Round, the controlling player may Deploy one Ground Unit from Reserves in base-to-base contact with this Faction Indicator.
boosts.name: Warp Conduit
Attack Move
boosts.description: Attack Move <Reaction> <Combat Phase>: When a Friendly Unit becomes Unengaged, it immediately performs a Move action.

Instinctive Reaction <Reaction> <Any Phase>: Use when an Enemy Unit declares a Close Combat Attack against a Friendly Unit. That Friendly Unit becomes eligible to make an Evade Roll against that attack.
boosts.name: Instinctive Reaction
Rapid Burrowing
boosts.description: Rapid Burrowing <Active> <Movement Phase>: Select one Friendly, Unengaged Ground Zerg Unit on the battlefield. That Unit gains the Burrowed Status, even if it has already been Activated this Round.
Brood Instinct <Reaction> <Any Phase>: Use before a Friendly Unit makes an Evade Roll. Apply a +1 Modifier to that roll.
boosts.name: Brood Instinct
Zerg Creep
boosts.description: Zerg Creep <Passive> <Any Phase>: During Army Building, select exactly one Creep Card and add it to their Army List, paying its listed cost (if any).
